prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated 2.0L Fiat Twin Cam (131 Racing/132 Abarth, engine code: **132A0.000**) with forged internals (Wiseco 8.5:1 pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, and a billet crankshaft) paired with a custom 4-2-1 stainless steel header by **Ansa** and a **Marelli IAW P8 ECU** tuned via **Alientech KESS3** for 180+ HP on 98 RON fuel

Full **Bilstein B16 PSS9** coilover suspension with **Eibach Pro-Kit springs** (25mm drop) and **SuperPro polybushings** (front/rear control arms, subframe, and differential mounts) for chassis rigidity, complemented by a **Tarox 280mm 4-pot big brake kit** with grooved rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads

Lightweight **OMP 6-point bolt-in roll cage** (FIA-approved, 25CrMo4 steel) with a **Sparco Pro2000 seat** and **Schroth 6-point harness**, paired with a **Quaife ATB helical LSD** (80% lock) and a **custom 4.875:1 final drive ratio** (from a Fiat 124 Spider Abarth) for mid-engine torque multiplication
estetica: **Rear diffuser by Zender** (1980s Group B-inspired, carbon fiber) with a **custom front splitter** (hand-laid fiberglass, 30mm overhang) and **side skirts from a Lancia Beta Montecarlo Turbo**, all painted in **PPG Fiat Rosso Corsa (code: 132/9)** with a **3M matte clear coat**

**BBS RS 012 wheels** (15x8 ET15 front, 15x9 ET10 rear) wrapped in **Pirelli P7 Corsa Classic** tires (195/50R15 front, 225/50R15 rear) with **custom center caps** (FIAT Abarth scorpion logo, anodized gold)

**Custom engine bay detailing** featuring a **polished Abarth 131 Racing valve cover**, **Samco Sport silicone hoses** (red, with gold crimped fittings), and a **Mocal oil cooler** (13-row, mounted behind the front bumper) with a **custom aluminum shroud** (laser-cut FIAT logo)
